title: lithocarpus eumorphus
intro: Lithocarpus eumorphus, also known as the California nutmeg or tanbark oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus eumorphus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Lithocarpus eumorphus can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are commonly used in herbal remedies.
